label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, so I need to analyze this ethical dilemma. Let me try to understand it first. There's a group of friends who often go out drinking on weekends. One of their friends has started going to Alcoholics Anonymous (AA) because he's an alcoholic. Now the group is wondering if they should keep inviting him to their drinking outings, which might make him want to drink again (relapse), or not invite him, which might make him feel left out and lonely. Hmm. So the problem is that if they invite him, there's a risk he might relapse, which is bad for his health and recovery. But if they don't invite him, they might be isolating him, which could also be bad for his mental health and make him feel like his friends don't support him.
